title: Xicz Gap Releaser
description:
This mod Automatically releases golden apples at the perfect tick to guarantee early consumption timing.

This is not the same as Consumable Optimizer.
body:
This Mod automatically releases your golden apple at the exact tick it successfully registers as eaten, removing the 1–3 wasted ticks most players accidentally hold after the effect has already applied.

# **What It Does**
Detects when a golden apple has officially completed on the server
Instantly releases right-click on that exact tick
Prevents human over-holding
Keeps timing perfectly consistent every single eat

## **Why This Matters**
Golden apples take 32 ticks (1.6 seconds) to eat.
Most players hold slightly longer than necessary because of reaction delay. With this you are force released so you saved time to run or swing back faster. OP For modes like Netherite Pot & UHC.
